Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

Intelligence Architecture for Regenerative Communities

As a regenerative community I want a knowledge system that connects self-referring loops So that retrieval, action, governance, and feedback operate as one coherent system
Scenario Community queries knowledge via natural language
Given17 wiki sources and 11 concepts define the community knowledge base
AndBen Goertzel's algorithmic chemistry provides the cognitive substrate
AndKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern provides compiled retrieval without manual indexing
AndMCP standardizes how agents connect to tools
Givena member asks "nitrogen-fixing trees near waterlogged soil"
Whenthe system performs sparse BM25 search and dense HNSW search
Andcombines results using Reciprocal Rank Fusion
Thenresults show 20-49% improvement over single-method retrieval
Andindividual token matches are honored even when full-sequence similarity is lower
Scenario Self-catalyzing programs produce emergent cognition
Given17 wiki sources and 11 concepts define the community knowledge base
AndBen Goertzel's algorithmic chemistry provides the cognitive substrate
AndKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern provides compiled retrieval without manual indexing
AndMCP standardizes how agents connect to tools
Givenalgorithmic chemistry defines programs that rewrite programs
Whencatalytic code drives self-organizing cognitive systems
Thenemergent cognition arises through self-reinforcing rewrite loops
Andno manual indexing is required to maintain the knowledge structure
Scenario Agents use other agents as tools
Given17 wiki sources and 11 concepts define the community knowledge base
AndBen Goertzel's algorithmic chemistry provides the cognitive substrate
AndKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern provides compiled retrieval without manual indexing
AndMCP standardizes how agents connect to tools
Givena high-level goal is set by a community member
Whenthe system decomposes the goal into sub-tasks
Andassigns specialized agents to each sub-task
Thenautonomous execution proceeds with minimal human intervention
Andthe full loop from goal to result completes without manual oversight
Scenario Agent skills package institutional knowledge
Given17 wiki sources and 11 concepts define the community knowledge base
AndBen Goertzel's algorithmic chemistry provides the cognitive substrate
AndKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern provides compiled retrieval without manual indexing
AndMCP standardizes how agents connect to tools
Givenan AI coding assistant needs community-specific knowledge
Whenit reads a SKILL.md file encoding institutional practices
Thenthe agent executes with community-aligned behavior
Andthe knowledge remains reusable across multiple agent invocations
Scenario Governance decisions affect real-world outcomes
Given17 wiki sources and 11 concepts define the community knowledge base
AndBen Goertzel's algorithmic chemistry provides the cognitive substrate
AndKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern provides compiled retrieval without manual indexing
AndMCP standardizes how agents connect to tools
Givena collective of agents must decide on resource allocation
Whenthe governance protocol evaluates evidence-based performance
Theninfluence flows to what's working
Andlosing approaches fade while successful ones replicate
Andno single entity can dominate the decision process
Scenario Knowledge retrieval at civilizational scale
Given17 wiki sources and 11 concepts define the community knowledge base
AndBen Goertzel's algorithmic chemistry provides the cognitive substrate
AndKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern provides compiled retrieval without manual indexing
AndMCP standardizes how agents connect to tools
Givenknowledge infrastructure has reached Phase 3 criticality
Whenthe community cannot function without digital coordination systems
Thenthe system provides reliable retrieval under all conditions
Andoffline operation continues without cloud dependency
AndP2P sync maintains consistency across mesh networks
Scenario Meta-layer connects all four architectural threads
Given17 wiki sources and 11 concepts define the community knowledge base
AndBen Goertzel's algorithmic chemistry provides the cognitive substrate
AndKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern provides compiled retrieval without manual indexing
AndMCP standardizes how agents connect to tools
Givenalgorithmic chemistry produces emergent cognition
Andknowledge graphs provide compiled retrieval over structured corpora
Andagent skills package institutional knowledge for autonomous execution
Andgovernance protocols handle collective decision-making with real-world consequences
Whenthe meta-layer connects all four threads
Thena civilizational operating system emerges for communities
Andknowledge retrieval, autonomous action, governance, and regenerative feedback operate as one system

Generated from wiki synthesis · validated with ghokin · deployed via GitHub Actions
